evidence: Package includes pyproject.toml, README.md, requirements.txt, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, API, CLI, Streamlit app, tests, and paper.
The module includes generated visualization outputs and test reports that need separation from source.
It belongs under the Forge-family package layer because it is a named applied Forge module with proof/paper material.
promotion_rule: Promote source, package metadata, paper, and tests first. Treat visualization outputs and JSON reports as generated artifacts unless a publication manifest asks for them.
